title: Savory Juicy Canadian Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Canadian-inspired stew featuring the warmth of ground cinnamon, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This plant-based-friendly dish is packed with juicy lentils and savory flavors.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrots, and celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 8 minutes.
Add the ground cinnamon, dried thyme, salt, and pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lentils, vegetable broth, and diced tomatoes. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30-40 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Blanch a handful of fresh parsley or kale in boiling water for 10-15 seconds, then drain and chop. Stir into the stew.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley or kale if desired.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for up to 5 days.
